title: Present Perfect with for/since — gap-fill
target_form: Present Perfect with for/since for ongoing states and actions
methodology_notes: Single tier (controlled). For full lesson, pair with a noticing item and a personalisation prompt. Form description follows Murphy EGiU 5e Unit 8 and Swan PEU §455.
sources: Murphy, English Grammar in Use 5e — Unit 8

exercises.rubric: Complete the sentences with the Present Perfect form of the verb in brackets, using 'for' or 'since' where appropriate.
exercises.context: All sentences are about Anna, a software engineer in Berlin.

items.explanation: Present Perfect for a state that started in the past and continues now; 'since' marks the start point.

items.stem: She _____ for the same company for five years. (work)
items.explanation: 'For' + duration with Present Perfect for ongoing employment.
Stative verb 'know' takes Present Perfect Simple, not Continuous.
